steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Triangle ABC ~ triangle XYZ with A↔X, B↔Y, C↔Z, so ∠Z = ∠C. The interior angles of triangle ABC sum to 180°: $$∠A + ∠B + ∠C = 180°$$

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Substitute the given angle measures: $$44° + 24° + ∠C = 180°$$ $$∠C = 180° - 68° = 112°$$ Since ∠Z = ∠C, the measure of angle Z is 112°.
